item.title: Infrawatch - Real Time Internet Intelligence
item.description: Real-time visibility into the infrastructure behind threats. Track proxies, VPNs, and hostile networks with high-fidelity internet signals, built for investigations, fraud prevention, and security operations.

item.title: GhostSocks - Lumma's Partner In Proxy - Codexa â Premium Developer Automation Template
item.description: This analysis explores GhostSocks, a Golang-based SOCKS5 proxy malware, detailing its integration with LummaC2 and its command-and-control infrastructure. We highlight its use of obfuscation and relay-based C2 communication, emphasising the threat it poses to financial institutions and other high-value targets.

item.title: Belarus-Linked DSLRoot Proxy Network Deploys Hardware in U.S. Residences, Including Military Homes - Codexa â Premium Developer Automation Template
item.description: Detailed analysis of DSLRoot, a residential proxy network deploying hardware across U.S. homes, operated by a Belarusian national. Includes technical overview, network footprint, and operator attribution.
